title: coilonox diluculum
intro: Coilonox diluculum, also known as the evening primrose, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Onagraceae. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its seeds, which are rich in gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), an essential fatty acid with anti-inflammatory and moisturizing properties. The health benefits of Coilonox diluculum include relief from symptoms of eczema, menopause, and cardiovascular disease, as well as improved skin and hair health. Herbal preparations of Coilonox diluculum typically involve extracting the GLA from the seeds, which can be taken as supplements, added to skincare products, or used in cooking and baking.
